faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Valley Stream?
faqs.answer: Valley Stream residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Pavement ants are especially common around driveways and foundations, while carpenter ants can damage wooden structures in older Valley Stream homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.
